new_value: Addressed by updated A.3 OSCORE section clarifying that OSCORE option (no. 9) travels in SCHC residue/tail after CoAP header. Cross-checked with secure.py:316 (option detection) and rules.rs. No interop gap in current vectors. P2 resolved.
